name: Easy Three-Cheese Pasta with Chicken and Mushrooms

ingredients.item: Salt and black pepper, to taste

method: Preheat the oven to 350 F and oil an ovenproof baking dish.
Prepare the pasta according to package directions and put it in the prepared baking dish. Toss with 2 tbsp. of the oil.
Meanwhile, in a large and deep skillet, heat the rest 1 tbsp. of olive oil. Then add in the onion and mushrooms and
over moderate high heat, cook while stirring frequently, until softened, about 5 minutes. Add the garlic and chicken.
Cook on low heat, stirring occasionally, about 2 minutes. Add the Ricotta cheese and half the Parmesan and fontina.
Toss everything in the baking dish. Top with the remaining fontina and Parmesan.
Bake the pasta until the cheese turns golden, 15-20 minutes.
(34) Mini Shell Bacon and Pea Pasta
This dish is a delicious take on the traditional bacon and peas pasta. It's a lightened up, healthier version that will
still make you feel like you're indulging. The new recipe combines pasta with vegetables, bacon, eggs, and peas in a
creamy sauce for a hearty meal that satisfies your hunger without weighing you down.
Tired of eating the same old thing? Try this dish for something new!
